title: ResetAbortEnabled Property, Spel Class
syntax:
Property ResetAbortEnabled As Boolean

DefaultValue

True

ReturnValue

True if ResetAbort is enabled, False if not.
description: Sets / returns whether ResetAbort should be enabled or not.
see_also:
ResetAbort

ResetAbortEnabled Example

VB Example:

' Enable reset abort

m_spel.ResetAbortEnabled = True

C# Example:

// Enable reset abort

m_spel.ResetAbortEnabled = true;
